title: Caulk
description: Fixes a few discrepancies made by new blocks not supported by the built-in Programmer Art resource pack.
body:
Caulk is a simple resource pack made to patch up the inconsistencies made when using Programmer Art by changing the texture of select blocks and items to help make them fit in with similar items.

Select Programmer Art textures (such as filled buckets and spectral arrows) have been redone or modified to make them mesh with other Programmer Art assets.

The pack changes:
<details><summary>Blocks</summary>

- Copper ore
- Crying obsidian
- Nether gold ore
- Nylium (Crimson, warped)
- Planks (Cherry, Crimson, Mangrove, Warped)
- Powder snow
- Suspicious Gravel
- Suspicious Sand
- Tinted glass

</details>


<details><summary>Items</summary>

- Boat (Cherry, mangrove)
- Chest boat (all)
- Crossbow
- Disc fragment 5
- Dyes (Black, blue, brown, white)
- Filled Buckets (Axolotl, cod, powder snow, pufferfish, salmon, tropical)
- Glow ink sac
- Glow item frame
- Hanging sign (All)
- Leather horse armor
- Lingering potion
- Music disc (Pigstep, Relic, 5)
- Netherite armor (Boots, chestplate, leggings)
- Netherite ingot
- Spectral arrow
- Splash potion
- Sign (Bamboo, cherry, crimson, mangrove, warped)
- Suspicious Stew
- Warped fungus on a stick

</details>

<details><summary>Entities</summary>

- Boat (Cherry, mangrove)
- Horse armor (Gold, iron, diamond)
- Chest boat (all)
- Sign (Bamboo, cherry, crimson, mangrove, warped)

</details>
